name: Free Mission Control for OpenClaw AI Agents
description: Set up JARVIS Mission Control — a free, self-hosted task and coordination hub for OpenClaw AI agents. Fork the GitHub repo, run locally, or connect to MissionDeck.ai for a cloud dashboard without hosting anything.
author: Asif2BD
changelog: v1.0.6: Context window meter in agent cards — live usage bar per agent (green/amber/red). New POST /api/agents/:id/context endpoint + report-context.sh heartbeat script. v1.0.5: Bidirectional cloud sync — cloud-created tasks sync back to local MC via startCloudPull() polling mc-api every 30s, triggering Telegram notifications.
